calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Class Action Allegations Pursuant To California Rules Of Court Rule 3.770 And Individual Claims From The Complaint Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JENNIE ANDERSON, Esq. of Andrus Anderson LLP (tel: 415-986-1400) for Plaintiffs.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WYATT MILLER, AGUILAR AUTO REPAIR, LLC's Motion To Dismiss Class Action Allegations Pursuant To California Rules Of Court Rule 3.770 And Individual Claims From The Complaint Without Prejudice.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed "motion to dismiss class action allegations pursuant to California Rules of Court rule 3.770 and individual claims from the complaint without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
